title: PM On How India Is Responding To Hormuz Chokehold-Driven Energy Crisis
summary_full: The war in Iran presents a "concerning situation" given India imports significant quantities of crude oil and gas from Gulf nations, Prime Minister Narendra Modi told Parliament Monday.
